title: A Noise Upstairs
content: Every night around ten o'clock, strange noises came from the upstairs room. The sounds were soft but regular, making Daniel curious. One evening, he decided to investigate. He slowly climbed the stairs and opened the door. Inside, he found an old ceiling fan that had become loose. Whenever the wind entered through a small window, the fan gently moved and made the unusual sound. After tightening the screws, the mysterious noise disappeared.
